ModMetaData.name: 时空立场投影仪 Temporal Barrier Projector
ModMetaData.author: Jeremie
ModMetaData.description:
时空立场投影仪 TemporalBarrierProjector
- 将 Ambition of the Cosmic: Custom Edition 中的 “时空立场投影仪(Temporal Barrier Projector)” ，并大幅增强了相关属性。 由于时空立场投影仪是一个眼部饰品，这就意味着不需要干扰穿着的衣服， 所以鼠鼠等具有特色服饰的种族可在保留服饰的基础上，通过这个物品获得各项属性加成和一个超级强力的随身能量护盾。 此物品大幅增加了角色的搬运能力，工作速度，移动速度，战斗能力，生存能力。 在安装 Animal Apparel: Framework (AnimalApparelFramework) 后，你的宠物也可以装备这个物品，获得同样的属性加成和护盾。 在安装 边缘仙路 (RimImmortal) 后，能增加负重上限。 在安装 奥德赛 DLC (Odyssey) 后，能增加真空抗性。
此物品最适合的场景： - 鼠鼠、龙、猫猫等具有特色服饰的种族，想要在不牺牲外观的前提下获得强力属性加成和护盾。 - 想要一个强力的终极防御装备选项的玩家。 - 需要大量搬运能力的玩家。（例如使用 边缘弹道导弹 (IRBM) 但是觉得装填速度太慢） - 需要超模防御力的玩家。（穿上这个可以跟虫贴脸）
这是一个独立Mod，完全不依赖于 Ambition of the Cosmic: Custom Edition 的任何内容，但它属于 AOTC 家族，旨在为玩家提供一个更强力的终极防御装备选项。
此Mod物品与 "Jeremie 的 SNS:AOPC:TPOC 补丁" 中的时空立场投影仪一模一样，但它不包含其他任何内容，适合不想玩SNS:AOPC:TPOC系列Mod和补丁的玩家单独使用。 https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3665204069
带 CE Patch ， 但因为我不玩 CE 所以不确定能不能正常工作。
----------------
[The English Describe Translated by Gemini]
- Restored the "Temporal Barrier Projector" from Ambition of the Cosmic: Custom Edition and significantly buffed its attributes. Since the projector is an eye accessory, it does not interfere with worn apparel. This allows races with unique outfits (like Ratkins) to keep their signature look while gaining massive stat boosts and a super-powerful portable energy shield. This item greatly enhances carrying capacity, work speed, movement speed, combat ability, and survivability. With the Animal Apparel: Framework installed, your pets can also equip this item to gain the same stat boosts and shield. With RimImmortal installed, it increases carrying capacity. With the Odyssey DLC installed, it increases vacuum resistance. With Odyssey DLC installed, it increases vacuum resistance.
This item is ideal for: - Players who want powerful stat boosts and a shield without sacrificing their character's unique appearance. - Players looking for a strong endgame defensive equipment option. - Players who need a lot of carrying capacity (e.g., using IRBM but find the reload speed too slow). - Players who want super high defense (you can facehug bugs with this).
This is a standalone mod that does not depend on any content from Ambition of the Cosmic: Custom Edition, but it belongs to the AOTC family and aims to provide players with a more powerful endgame defensive equipment option.
This item is identical to the Temporal Barrier Projector in "Jeremie's SNS:AOPC:TPOC Patch", but it does not include any other content, making it suitable for players who want to use it independently without playing the SNS:AOPC:TPOC series of mods and patches. https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3665204069
This mod includes the CE Patch, but since I don't play CE, I'm not sure if it works properly.
----------------
暂时没有加入工作台，请在dev模式下搜索 `TemporalBarrierProjector` 来获得这个物品。
Just not added to any workbenches for now, please search for `TemporalBarrierProjector` in dev mode to get this item.
